description_long: This bungalow features a single-story rectangular structure with a prominent gable roof covered in light gray shingles. The front facade includes a covered porch supported by wooden posts and large glass windows, allowing ample natural light into the main living area. The exterior walls are finished in a light beige color, with visible window frames and a main entrance door under the porch. The roof has a small brick chimney at its center, and the eaves extend outward, providing additional shade. Windows are arranged asymmetrically along the sides, with a mix of single and double-pane designs. The overall design is simple yet functional, suitable for suburban or residential neighborhoods.
description: A single-story rectangular bungalow with a gable roof, covered porch, and large front windows. The exterior is light beige with a central chimney and asymmetrical window placement.
description_view_0: Side view showing two windows, the main entrance under a small awning, and part of the covered porch.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the covered porch, large glass windows, and the full width of the gable roof.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a central back door, a small awning, and minimal window openings.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with two small windows and the extended roof eaves.
